aboutMe:
Hello!
I've been building web applications with React and TypeScript for over four years.
I write clean, maintainable code, optimize performance, and work effectively in cross-functional teams.
toolsOfTheTradeDescription: I use time-tested tools and modern practices to create scalable and maintainable front-end architecture.

intern.description: Contributed to a React/TypeScript startup and built web applications from scratch, mastering core UI patterns and state management.

junior.description: Completed 3+ projects using React for international and domestic clients, taking into account modern front-end templates and flexible development methodologies (Agile/Scrum).

middle.description: Developed high-performance React applications from scratch utilizing Vite, Zustand, and React Query. Integrated Keycloak auth, Docker containers, and Storybook components, optimizing workflow with AI assistants.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.ndaTooltip: The source code and live site are confidential under a Non-Disclosure Agreement.

shopkit.title: Fintech | Risk Monitoring Platform
shopkit.type: Internal admin service for statistical data collection
shopkit.description: A high-load analytical dashboard (Event/Market Liability Monitor) built for internal risk tracking. Implemented a complex system of interconnected filters and multi-criteria sorting, engineered efficient server-side pagination for data-dense tables, and optimized React Query caching for seamless data auto-updates.

bcs.title: BCS | Internal Banking Application
bcs.type: A fintech platform designed for corporate document generation, validation, and processing.
bcs.description: Successfully migrated the application's global design system from MUI to Ant Design. Led the modernization of legacy UI, developed robust dynamic forms with complex state validation (React Hook Form), and optimized data-heavy filtering components.

eis.title: EIS
eis.type: Unified digital ecosystem for railway logistics
eis.description: A large-scale B2B platform designed to automate logistics and match cargo supply with demand. Developed complex multi-step wizard forms from scratch, configured automated API client generation using Orval, and covered key UI components with Storybook stories.
